name: subcontact
description: Sub-contacts — the discretized contact segments where the joint constitutive model acts. This is where joint state / model / property live: 'colorby state' shows slip/separation, 'colorby model' shows the assigned jmodel. 'hide-nforce0' hides segments carrying no normal force.

basic_keywords.description: Show or hide the item without removing it.
Clip the item against the global model clip box.
Set the discrete colour list used for categorical colouring.
Categorical colour entities by an attribute (group, type, state, ...). See sub-item 'colorby'.
Apply a 3D cutting plane to the item.
Configure the contour colour map (ranges, intervals, colours).
Filter which entities are drawn using range elements (see references/range-elements).
Set item transparency (0 opaque .. 100 fully transparent).

sub_items.name: colorby
sub_items.description: Categorical colour subcontacts by state, model, property, group, joint-set, dfn, ...

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create subcontact colorby state legend active on
common_usage_patterns.description: Show which sub-contacts are slipping / open / bonded.

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create subcontact colorby model legend active on
common_usage_patterns.description: Colour by the assigned joint constitutive model.

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create subcontact colorby state hide-nforce0 on
common_usage_patterns.description: Drop sub-contacts with zero normal force.

notes: Probe live with 'plot item create <type> ?' to list top-level keywords, then 'plot item create <type> <kw> ?' for sub-options. Keyword sets here are binary-validated against 3DEC 9.0.
